# Language

Use german language in the layout
Use passive voice ("Es werden ... verwendet") instead of active voice ("Wir verwenden ...")
Address the user in the formal 3rd person.

# Styles

Check GlobalStyles.astro to understand the general layout:
body > section > div(.centered)
Padding is applied to top level section elements and footer to align content
div.centered is used to auto apply flex-col
Use clean minimalistic styles
